# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects to prevent SSRF.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist expected hosts or domains before making outbound requests.
- Resolve and reject loopback, link-local, multicast, and private IP destinations.
- Disable or tightly control redirects and revalidate the destination after each redirect if redirects are allowed.
- Use network egress controls when available.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not fetch arbitrary user-provided URLs without validation.
- Do not allow access to internal addresses such as 127.0.0.1, 169.254.169.254, or RFC1918/private ranges.
- Do not rely only on URL string format checks.
# Category: ssrf

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import axios from 'axios';
import { parse } from 'node-html-parser';
import dns from 'dns/promises';
import { URL } from 'url';
import net from 'net';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

const ALLOWED_DOMAINS = [
  'example.com',
  'trusted-site.com',
  'news.example.org'
];

interface MetadataResponse {
  title: string;
  description: string;
}

function isPrivateIP(ip: string): boolean {
  const parts = ip.split('.').map(Number);
  
  if (net.isIPv6(ip)) {
    const lower = ip.toLowerCase();
    return lower.startsWith('::1') ||
           lower.startsWith('fe80:') ||
           lower.startsWith('fc00:') ||
           lower.startsWith('fd00:');
  }
  
  if (parts.length !== 4) return true;
  
  if (parts[0] === 127) return true;
  if (parts[0] === 10) return true;
  if (parts[0] === 172 && parts[1] >= 16 && parts[1] <= 31) return true;
  if (parts[0] === 192 && parts[1] === 168) return true;
  if (parts[0] === 169 && parts[1] === 254) return true;
  if (parts[0] === 0) return true;
  if (parts[0] >= 224) return true;
  
  return false;
}

async function validateURL(urlString: string): Promise<void> {
  const url = new URL(urlString);
  
  if (url.protocol !== 'http:' && url.protocol !== 'https:') {
    throw new Error('Only HTTP and HTTPS protocols are allowed');
  }
  
  const hostname = url.hostname.toLowerCase();
  
  const isAllowed = ALLOWED_DOMAINS.some(domain => 
    hostname === domain || hostname.endsWith('.' + domain)
  );
  
  if (!isAllowed) {
    throw new Error('Domain not in allowlist');
  }
  
  let addresses: string[];
  try {
    addresses = await dns.resolve4(hostname);
  } catch {
    try {
      addresses = await dns.resolve6(hostname);
    } catch {
      throw new Error('Unable to resolve hostname');
    }
  }
  
  for (const ip of addresses) {
    if (isPrivateIP(ip)) {
      throw new Error('Private or internal IP address detected');
    }
  }
}

app.post('/api/link-preview', async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
  try {
    const url: string = req.body.url;
    
    if (!url || typeof url !== 'string') {
      res.status(400).json({ error: 'URL is required and must be a string' });
      return;
    }
    
    await validateURL(url);
    
    const response = await axios.get(url, {
      timeout: 5000,
      maxRedirects: 0,
      headers: {
        'User-Agent': 'LinkPreviewBot/1.0'
      },
      validateStatus: (status) => status === 200
    });
    
    const html = response.data;
    const root = parse(html);
    
    let title = '';
    let description = '';
    
    const ogTitle = root.querySelector('meta[property="og:title"]');
    const titleTag = root.querySelector('title');
    title = ogTitle?.getAttribute('content') || titleTag?.text || '';
    
    const ogDescription = root.querySelector('meta[property="og:description"]');
    const metaDescription = root.querySelector('meta[name="description"]');
    description = ogDescription?.getAttribute('content') || 
                  metaDescription?.getAttribute('content') || '';
    
    const metadata: MetadataResponse = {
      title: title.trim(),
      description: description.trim()
    };
    
    res.json(metadata);
  } catch (error: any) {
    if (error.message?.includes('allowlist') || 
        error.message?.includes('Private') || 
        error.message?.includes('protocol')) {
      res.status(403).json({ error: 'URL not allowed' });
    } else {
      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch metadata' });
    }
  }
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`Server running on port ${PORT}`);
});
